param.label: XG Graph
param.help: Writing the alignments in SAM, BAM, or CRAM format can have poor performance. Specify a XG graph that is compatible with the input graph to avoid that. This is mandatory if your input GBZ or GBWTGraph is missing reference paths for surjection (e.g., if it was created with a vg version older than 1.37.0). This option is ignored if the input graph is already an XG graph

param.label: GBWT Index
param.help: Use this GBWT index while mapping

param.label: Interleaved Pairs
param.help: Check this if the input file contains interleaved paired-end reads

param.label: Comments as Tags
param.help: Treat comments in FASTQ/FASTA name lines as SAM-style tags and annotate alignments with them

param.label: Named Coordinates
param.help: Output coordinates named instead of node IDs. This only works if the input graph supports it (e.g., was created from a GFA file with segment names); otherwise, tool execution will fail

param.label: Reference Name
param.help: Name of the reference assembly to use as the target for surjection

param.label: Reference Paths File
param.help: A text file (one path name per line) to define the target sequences for surjection and their order for the @SQ header

param.label: Add Graph Alignment
param.help: Annotate records with a cs-style difference string of the pre-surjected graph alignment in the GR tag

param.label: Sample Name
param.help: Add the sample name to the output

param.label: Read Group
param.help: Add the read group to the output

param.label: Add Reference Offset
param.help: Add the reference offset for reads to the output
